summary_text: Found the concrete paths and commands. Key point: in this repo, `scripts/local/integrations` mainly handles thumbnail sync; Notion row create/update/scheduling is implemented in the external x-auto runtime at `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto`. **Data Sources** - Live queue JSON (schedule/status source): [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json) - Notion DB + queue config: [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/config.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/config.py) - Notion property mapping (`scheduled_for` -> `Scheduled`, `status` -> `Status`, `Body`, `Source URLs`, etc.): [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py) **Notion Row Create/Update Scripts** - Create or update one row directly: - [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/upsert_notion_draft.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/upsert_notion_draft.py) - Guarded apply (preflight + optional approve + optional image sync): - [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/apply_post_package.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/apply_post_package.py) - Image sync + Notion thumbnail QA fields: - [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/sync_post_image.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/sync_post_image.py) **Local Artifact / Integration Helpers in this repo** - Approved thumbnail -> x-auto asset + Notion Image sync: - [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py) - Batch missing draft thumbnail sync (updates queue fields + calls x-auto image sync): - [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/xauto_sync_missing_draft_thumbnails.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/xauto_sync_missing_draft_thumbnails.py) - Draft artifact schema examples (includes `scheduled_for`, `status`, `notion_page_id`): - [`/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json) **Actionable Command Templates** ```bash # 1) Create/update Notion row from one post JSON (draft or approved based on JSON status) python3 /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/upsert_notion_draft.py \ --input /tmp/post.json \ --page-id <existing_notion_page_id_optional> # 2) Guarded apply for schedulable post (includes preflight checks; --approve sets status=approved) python3 /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/apply_post_package.py \ --input /tmp/post.json \ --page-id <existing_notion_page_id_optional> \ --approve # 3) Sync final image to Notion row (Image + thumbnail QA props) python3 /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/sync_post_image.py \ --page-id <notion_page_id> \ --image-path /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/images/<post_id>.png \ --generator codex-varied --gate2-pass --qa-verified ``` For scheduling at a concrete time (e.g., today `17:00`), the post JSON must include: - `scheduled_for: "YYYY-MM-DD 17:00"` - `status: "approved"` (if scheduler should pick it up)
